## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Machine-readable result exists.
- [ ] Human-readable report exists.
- [ ] Claim boundary is explicit.
- [ ] Stronger baseline or proof pressure is discussed.
- [ ] Portfolio audit passes, or failure is documented as the result.

## Review Needed

- [ ] Baseline adversary.
- [ ] Theory reviewer.
- [ ] Integration reviewer.
- [ ] Audit reviewer.
